[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 1001101 4
2 1001011 4
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0011000 2

01 10 0001000 1
